title: Obamacraft: Frozen Wasteland
description: The Obamacraft post apocalyptic frozen hellscape land.
body:
# Welcome to a Frozen Hellscape
The Earth has turned into ice, a deep frost has taken root, and the storm is always present. Not even a God can turn the ice around.

## Fight through the ice and explore new places.
- Explore the Aether, Undergarden, and more!
- Find rare strucutres, and maybe human life
- Try to find saftey underground!

## Learn of the horrors that have taken root in the world
- Beings of cryptic origins
- Sealed away bosses from eons ago

## Defeat the curse
Unseal bosses, find the guardian, and try to possibly defeat the curse!
